name: Thought Leadership
description: Share expertise with hook-insights-CTA structure to build authority.

variables.name: hook
variables.description: Opening line — first 210 chars visible before 'see more'. Use stats, contrast, or a bold claim.

variables.name: insight_1
variables.description: First key insight, prefixed with emoji

variables.name: closing
variables.description: Call to action or question. E.g. 'What's your experience?' or 'Which one resonates most?'

variables.name: hashtags
variables.description: 1-3 precise hashtags at end. Never more than 3.

tips: Optimal post length: 1300-1600 chars for highest engagement
Be available in golden hour (first 60 min) to reply to comments
Storytelling beats dry information — use personal experience
example_output:
I spent 3 years building MCP servers and here's what nobody tells you...

After shipping 15 integrations across LinkedIn, Slack, and GitHub:

1. The tool description is 80% of the battle
2. Structured output beats raw text every time
3. OAuth is harder than the actual API

What's the most painful integration you've built?

#MCP #DevTools #AI
